overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Assassin's Creed Mirage) showing a hooded character in white robes exploring a historical Middle Eastern city with ornate Islamic architecture. The character ascends stairs, traverses rooftop terraces, and circumnavigates a prominent blue-tiled dome structure overlooking an interior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley leading to exterior stone staircase

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase
emerging from enclosed alley onto upper terrace level

agents.ego_description: climbing a stone staircase along the exterior of a building with ornate brickwork and decorative tile patterns

entered.detail: crimson fabric banners hanging from stone walls
dark arched entrance to building interior
wooden wagon loaded with pottery and cloth-wrapped goods
wide stone stairs with carved railings leading upward
intricate herringbone brick patterns with tile inlays

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a narrow stone alley beside a building with red banners, then ascends a wide exterior staircase. The walls feature ornate brickwork and decorative tiles, with potted plants lining the steps as the character climbs toward the rooftop level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway approaching a blue domed structure

events.description: large blue tiled dome becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated terrace walkway toward a prominent blue dome structure

entered.detail: large ornate dome with blue ceramic tiles and geometric patterns
carved stone balustrade with geometric lattice patterns
intricately patterned stone pavement with mosaic designs

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a sunlit rooftop terrace with ornate tiled flooring, walking toward a magnificent blue-domed structure in the distance. The stone railing features intricate carvings as the camera approaches the dome along the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace overlooking interior courtyard with arched colonnades

events.description: view opens to reveal interior courtyard with pool and arched walkways below
character turns right to continue circumnavigating the dome structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace edge overlooking a courtyard with a central pool, observing the architecture

entered.detail: sunken courtyard with rectangular pool and surrounding arcades
row of horseshoe arches with intricate stonework facing the courtyard
bushes and flowering plants in planters along the terrace edge
rectangular water feature in the courtyard below

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the terrace perimeter with the blue dome now on the left, revealing a stunning view of an interior courtyard with a central pool and arched colonnades below. The path continues around the dome structure with rooftop gardens visible, before turning to reveal red banners on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level terrace around the base of the blue dome

events.description: descending stairs from rooftop to ground level around the dome base
approaching an NPC seated on a rug near the dome wall

agents.ego_description: descending to ground level and walking around the base of the blue dome, passing a seated NPC on an outdoor rug with pottery

notable_agents.action: sitting on a rug near the dome base, appears to be resting or eating

entered.detail: wooden fence structure with shields leaning against it
large patterned carpet laid on the stone ground
large clay urns and vessels stacked near the wall
green painted wooden door with decorative frame

segments.scene_description: The character descends stairs to ground level and walks around the base of the massive blue dome, passing wooden barricades and pottery jars. An NPC sits on an outdoor rug near the dome wall as the character continues around the structure, looking up at the intricate tilework of the dome against the clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a narrow street into the heights of a palace before descending to the base of a monumental blue dome. It begins in a stone alley beside red banners, climbing a wide exterior staircase lined with potted plants and ornate brickwork. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens onto a sunlit rooftop terrace where the camera glides along carved railings toward a magnificent blue-domed structure. The perspective then shifts to follow the terrace perimeter, revealing a sprawling interior courtyard with a central pool and arched colonnades below before turning back toward red banners. Finally, the camera descends to ground level to circumnavigate the massive dome, passing wooden barricades and a seated NPC while looking up at the intricate tilework against a clear sky.
